title: Lennox Announces Definitive Agreement to Sell European Process Cooling Business to Glen Dimplex
text: DALLAS , Aug. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient climate-control solutions, announces it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its Hyfra Process Cooling business unit, headquartered in Krunkel, Germany, to the Glen Dimplex Group. The closing of the transaction is subject to obtaining required consents and customary closing conditions.

title: Home-builder ETFs jump after data show new-home sales rose in July despite high mortgage rates
text: Exchange-traded funds that buy shares of home builders are swinging higher after fresh data on Wednesday showed new-home sales in the U.S. climbed by more than anticipated in July.

title: Lennox (LII) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Lennox (LII) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: 3 Sizzling Stocks to Snatch Up for Hot Summer Profits
text: It shouldn't surprise anyone in the U.S. that July 2023 was the hottest month ever recorded on Earth. It is so hot that some cities have gone an entire month without temperatures falling below 100 degrees Fahrenheit.
